message:
fix: prevent duplicate auto-convoy creation on sling

Add fallback description-based lookup when cross-rig dependency query fails.
During Dolt instability, bd dep list would fail silently, causing gt sling to
create duplicate convoys for the same issue.

The fix adds findConvoyByDescription() which queries open convoys directly
and checks if any has description containing "tracking <beadID>". This is
more robust than cross-rig routing (G19, G21 bugs).

Tested: dry-run sling correctly detects existing convoy via description match.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
